### Append to CSV

**ID**: `UiPath.CSV.Activities.AppendCsvFile@UiPath.Excel.Activities/3.4.1`
**Type**: `UiPath.CSV.Activities.AppendCsvFile`
**Category**: Excel.CSV
**Description**: Copies an Excel range, table, or sheet, or table data saved for later, and pastes it after existing data in a specified CSV file
**Arguments**:
- `FilePath` (in [required]): `InArgument<String>`
- `DataTable` (in [required]): `InArgument<Data.DataTable>`
- `Encoding` (in): `InArgument<String>`
**Other members**:
- `Delimitator` [property]: `UiPath.CSV.DelimitatorOptions`
### Write CSV

**ID**: `UiPath.CSV.Activities.AppendWriteCsvFile@UiPath.Excel.Activities/3.4.1`
**Type**: `UiPath.CSV.Activities.AppendWriteCsvFile`
**Category**: Excel.CSV
**Description**: Copies an Excel range, table, or sheet, or table data saved for later, and pastes it in a specified CSV file either pasting it after existing data or replacing any existing data in the file.

### Append Range Workbook

**Type**: `UiPath.Excel.Activities.AppendRange`
**Category**: Excel
**Description**: Appends the data from a DataTable to a spreadsheet. If the sheet does not exist, a new one is created with the SheetName value. Changes are immediately saved
**Arguments**:
- `DataTable` (in [required]): `InArgument<Data.DataTable>`
- `SheetName` (in [required]): `InArgument<String>`

- `WorkbookPath` (in [required]): `InArgument<String>`
- `WorkbookPathResource` (in [required]): `InArgument<UiPath.Platform.ResourceHandling.IResource>`
- `Password` (in): `InArgument<String>`

**Type**: `UiPath.Excel.Activities.ReadRange`
**Category**: Excel
**Description**: Reads the value of a range in Range Excel Format from a spreadsheet as a DataTable. If Range isn&apos;t specified, the whole spreadsheet is read. If range is specified as a cell, the whole spreadsheet starting from that cell is read

### Write Cell Workbook

**ID**: `UiPath.Excel.Activities.WriteCell@UiPath.Excel.Activities/3.4.1`
**Type**: `UiPath.Excel.Activities.WriteCell`
**Category**: Excel
**Description**: Writes the Text value into a cell from a spreadsheet. If the sheet does not exist, a new one is created with the SheetName value. If a value exists, it is overwritten. Changes are immediately saved
**Arguments**:
- `Cell` (in [required]): `InArgument<String>`
- `Text` (in [required]): `InArgument<String>`
- `SheetName` (in [required]): `InArgument<String>`

### Write Range Workbook

**ID**: `UiPath.Excel.Activities.WriteRange@UiPath.Excel.Activities/3.4.1`
**Type**: `UiPath.Excel.Activities.WriteRange`
**Category**: Excel
**Description**: Writes the data from a DataTable in a spreadsheet starting from StartingCell. If StartingCell isn&apos;t specified, the writing begins at A1 cell. If the sheet does not exist, a new one is created with the SheetName value. All cells within the DataTable range are overwritten. Changes are immediately saved
**Arguments**:
- `StartingCell` (in): `InArgument<String>`
- `DataTable` (in [required]): `InArgument<Data.DataTable>`
- `SheetName` (in [required]): `InArgument<String>`
- `Workbook` (in): `InArgument<UiPath.Excel.Workbook>`
- `WorkbookPath` (in [required]): `InArgument<String>`
- `WorkbookPathResource` (in [required]): `InArgument<UiPath.Platform.ResourceHandling.IResource>`
- `Password` (in): `InArgument<String>`
**Other members**:
- `AddHeaders` [property]: `Boolean`

**ID**: `UiPath.Excel.Activities.Business.SequenceX@UiPath.Excel.Activities/3.4.1`
**Type**: `UiPath.Excel.Activities.Business.SequenceX`
**Category**: Excel.Windows
**Description**: Use this activity as root of your Attended Workflow to enforce that at most one Excel process exists at start of execution.  This behavior ensures all the Excel documents are open in the same Excel process and will make your workflow more stable and faster. This activity is used as root for StudioX workflows.
_No members extracted._

# UiPath.FTP.Activities 2.3.0

> generator: uips-fixtures catalog v0.1
> generated: 2026-04-06T08:08:08Z
> set: watchful-anvil
> activities: 0
> authors: UiPath
**ID format**: `{fullName}@{packageId}/{packageVersion}`
**Argument directions**: In (input), Out (output), InOut (bidirectional)

# UiPath.PDF.Activities 3.25.2

**Type**: `UiPath.Core.Activities.LogMessage`

**Arguments**:
- `FileName` (in [required]): `InArgument<String>`
- `Image` (in [required]): `InArgument<UiPath.Core.Image>`
- `ContinueOnError` (in): `InArgument<Boolean>`

**ID**: `UiPath.Core.Activities.InjectDotNetCode@UiPath.UIAutomation.Activities/23.10.20`
**Type**: `UiPath.Core.Activities.InjectDotNetCode`
**Category**: UI Automation
**Description**: Injects .NET code into target process.

- `AssemblyPath` (in [required]): `InArgument<String>`
- `TypeName` (in [required]): `InArgument<String>`

### Google Cloud Vision OCR

**ID**: `UiPath.Core.Activities.GoogleCloudOCR@UiPath.UIAutomation.Activities/23.10.20`
**Type**: `UiPath.Core.Activities.GoogleCloudOCR`
**Category**: UI Automation
**Description**: Extracts a string and its information from an indicated UI element using the Google Cloud Vision OCR engine. It can be used with other OCR activities (Click OCR Text, Hover OCR Text, Double Click OCR Text, Get OCR Text, Find OCR Text Position). 
**Arguments**:
- `ApiKey` (in): `InArgument<String>`
- `Region` (in): `InArgument<UiPath.Vision.Core.OCR.GoogleCloudRegion>`
- `Language` (in): `InArgument<String>`
- `Scale` (in): `InArgument<Double>`
- `Text` (out): `OutArgument<String>`
- `Image` (in [required]): `InArgument<Drawing.Image>`
- `Profile` (in): `InArgument<UiPath.Vision.OCR.OCRProfile>`
**Other members**:
- `DetectionMode` [property]: `UiPath.Vision.Core.OCR.GoogleCloudDetectionMode`
- `ResizeToApiLimits` [property]: `Boolean`
- `ExtractWords` [property]: `Boolean`
- `FilterRegion` [property]: `UiPath.Core.Region`
